name: bigvgan_optimized_dataset
description: BigVGAN fine-tuning on optimized dataset (134 clips, 44.1kHz, LUFS-normalized). Standard mode (no LoRA) — trains decoder to faithfully reconstruct target domain audio from mel spectrograms. Uses optimal config from prior sweeps.

experiments.description: Standard mode: mel from clean FLAC → BigVGAN → reconstruct FLAC. No LoRA. Directly improves VAE roundtrip quality.
Standard mode + discriminator feature matching. Tests if perceptual loss helps on clean audio reconstruction.
Extended 10k steps. More data passes on 134 clips may extract more from the optimized dataset.
